Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class PromptVersion

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.PromptVersion
public class PromptVersion extends Object

Java class for PromptVersion complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PromptVersion">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionButtonLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="actionButtonLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="body" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="customApplication" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="delayDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dismissButtonLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="displayPosition" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptDisplayPosition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="displayType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptDisplayType"/>
         <element name="elementRelativePosition" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptElementRelativePosition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="endDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="experience" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptExperience" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="experienceContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="header" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="icon" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="image" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="imageAltText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="imageLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="imageLocation" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptImageLocation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indexWithIsPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="indexWithoutIsPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="publishedByUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="publishedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="referenceElementContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldDisplayActionButton" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="shouldIgnoreGlobalDelay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="startDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="stepNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetAppDeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetAppNamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetPageKey1" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetPageKey2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetPageKey3" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetPageKey4" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetPageType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="themeColor" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptThemeColor" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="themeSaturation" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptThemeSaturation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="timesToDisplay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="uiFormulaRule" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}UiFormulaRule" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userAccess" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptUserAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userProfileAccess" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PromptUserProfileAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="videoLink" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
